description: ProofClaims JWS replay — attacker replays a captured request within the 30-second exp window
mitigation: JTI dedup cache (Redis SETNX TTL=30s) + req hash binding + exp<iat+30

description: Rogue Sentinel registration with stolen or forged enrollment token
mitigation: One-time use token + 128-bit UUID entropy + 1h expiry + mTLS onboarding channel

description: Cross-environment VC replay — using a dev VC in prod
mitigation: env claim verification at Step 7 + separate DIDs per env (ADR-007)

description: Stale status list acceptance after revocation
mitigation: Delta-bounded freshness + FAIL_CLOSED on stale cache + on-chain hash anchor
mTLS transmission + one-time use + Vault storage

description: Issuer key compromise enabling mass VC forgery
mitigation: IssuerRegistry.disableIssuer on-chain + Sentinels check isActive per request (SI-005)

description: Consumer Sentinel DID key theft from memory or Vault
mitigation: Keys in Vault only + Vault audit log + no plaintext disk writes (SI-009)

description: Discovery compromise enabling endpoint injection via malicious config bundle
mitigation: Config bundle JWS signature verified before application (SI-012)
Require 12 block confirmations for registry writes + cached verified state
JWS signature verification + reject if invalid (SI-012)

description: JWT alg:none attack bypassing signature verification
mitigation: Explicit PROHIBITED_ALGS check before any crypto operation (SI-006)

description: Status list bitstring substitution or tampering in cache
mitigation: SHA-256 hash verified against on-chain StatusListAnchor (SI-013)

description: Redis replay cache unavailable allowing double-spend of JTI
mitigation: Redis sentinel/cluster for HA + conservative timeout + reject on Redis error
